title: [HWCleanup] Missed optimization because of not being CSEd

features.name: duplicate if conditions in clocked always block
features.description: Code should include two separate if statements with identical compound expressions using ~(busy|~valid) pattern in an always @(posedge clock) block

features.name: chisel nested when collapsing to same expression
features.description: Code should include Chisel/FIRRTL nested when conditions that canonicalize to ~(busy|~valid) appearing in two different scopes
features.snippet:
when not(busy):
  when valid:
    bar <= value
    foo <= value
